name: Peter Kastner's Wish List
description: Kastner's personal 2002 holiday wish list of six digital consumer technology products: HP Scanjet 5500c, Dell Axim X5 Pocket PC, Viewsonic NextVision N6 PC-HDTV bridge, Gateway Profile 4 XL all-in-one, nVidia GeForce FX graphics card, and Davis Instruments Vantage Pro Plus weather station. Each item is framed as both a consumer product and an industry signal.
